invariants.name: attack completed without throwing
no page crash
no hang (within per-attack timeout)
robustness: no console errors or warnings
jsonl[0]: well-formed (one valid record per line)
history: exactly one session_header per session_id
history: every round has a matching session_header
history: no duplicate round_index within a session
history: round_index strictly increasing per session
session flush: rounds are contiguous under their header (QA-007 order)
money conservation: bankroll chains and deltas balance
card conservation: no card dealt twice within a shoe
seed integrity: on-screen seed matches session_header.seed
no stuck UI: a fresh Deal still resolves after the attack

results.repro: start → 6 same-tick Deal clicks → stand out → 2 rounds → download
